summary: Regression + new-feature E2E for the expanded Neo Vertex Ventures site (13 sections). Backend: 12/12 pytest cases pass (root status, briefing create 201, all 5 intents, 422 for invalid email/intent/missing-required/short-name, list desc ordering, limit 0/600 -> 400, limit valid). Frontend: 68/68 Playwright assertions pass — hero headline, all 5 nav links scrolling to #platform/#agents/#research/#industries/#vision, all 7 stack modules, all 10 agents, all 5 research keywords, 9 primary + 4 secondary industries, all 6 why-pillars, future section with 'operate on AI' + 3 eras, build & footer briefing CTAs open dialog, valid briefing POST -> success state, footer copyright 2026, mobile drawer + mobile briefing CTA.

issues:
Rendered text collapses without spaces between line fragments: 'We build theintelligence infrastructurefor the AI Enterprise.' Visual is fine because
separates lines, but copied / screen-reader text reads as one word. Consider adding a non-breaking space or aria-label.

action_items: (Low) Improve hero headline accessibility: add whitespace or aria-label so screen readers/SEO don't read 'theintelligence infrastructurefor'.
(Low) Consider rate-limiting / honeypot on POST /api/briefings before production — unauthenticated public endpoint.
(Low) /api/briefings has no DELETE endpoint; TEST_-prefixed seed rows accumulate in MongoDB across iterations.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is referenced inside create_briefing (line 98) but only configured at module bottom (line 134). Works at request-time but is stylistically out of order — move logging.basicConfig + logger above route definitions.

Nav.jsx: two of the five nav link testids are hard-coded strings ('nv-nav-link-research', 'nv-nav-link-industries') instead of using NV.* constants. Add NV.navLinkResearch / NV.navLinkIndustries to the registry for consistency.

neoVertex.js registry still contains legacy testids (trustStrip, platformLayer, capabilitiesSection, capabilityBlock, manifestoSection) for components that no longer exist in App.js — dead code; safe to remove.
BriefingDialog public POST has no rate-limit / captcha / honeypot — abuse risk.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_-prefixed briefing records (test_*@example.com) inserted by pytest + 1 by Playwright. No cleanup endpoint exists; data persists in MongoDB briefing_requests collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL via /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_briefings.py (run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_briefings.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`). All testids in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/neoVertex.js — note research/industries nav-link testids are inline string literals in Nav.jsx, not in the registry. Footer briefing CTA is `nv-footer-cta-briefing` (renamed from old `nv-hero-cta-primary-footer`). Mobile briefing CTA is `nv-nav-cta-briefing-mobile`. BriefingDialog intent field is a native <select> (not a shadcn dropdown), so Playwright should use page.select_option, not click on options.
rca of the issue: No defects found. All review-request items verified end-to-end.
